# IoT Security Gateway Lab

## Vai tro cua gateway trong bao mat IoT

**MSSV:** 231A010001 | **Ho ten:** Luong Nguyen Ngoc Dinh

### Luong xu ly:
1. Input Normalization
2. RULE-01: Token Authentication
3. RULE-02: Device Allowlist
4. RULE-03: Schema Validation
5. RULE-04: Sensor Range Validation
6. RULE-05: Timestamp Freshness
7. RULE-06: Replay Protection
8. Audit Logging -> Decision (ACCEPT/REJECT)

name: Input Normalization
RULE-01 Token Auth
RULE-02 Device Allowlist
RULE-03 Schema Validation
RULE-04 Sensor Range
RULE-05 Freshness Check
RULE-06 Replay Protection
Audit Logger

info:
### Inject Node Test Cases

| # | Inject Node | Expected |
|---|------------|----------|
| 1 | VALID - Normal Data | ACCEPT |
| 2 | INVALID - Bad Token | REJECT RULE-01 |
| 3 | INVALID - Unknown Device | REJECT RULE-02 |
| 4 | INVALID - Missing Field | REJECT RULE-03 |
| 5 | INVALID - High Temperature | REJECT RULE-04 |
| 6 | INVALID - Invalid Humidity | REJECT RULE-04 |
| 7 | INVALID - Stale Timestamp | REJECT RULE-05 |
| 8 | INVALID - Replay/Duplicate | REJECT RULE-06 |

**Note:** TC-08 (Replay) requires TC-01 to be injected first.

### OWASP ISVS Mapping

| Rule | OWASP ISVS Reference |
|------|---------------------|
| RULE-01 | ISVS-2.1.1: Device-to-Gateway Authentication |
| RULE-02 | ISVS-2.1.3: Device Identity & Access Control |
| RULE-03 | ISVS-3.1.1: Input Validation - Data Format |
| RULE-04 | ISVS-3.2.1: Sensor Data Integrity Validation |
| RULE-05 | ISVS-2.3.4: Time-based Access / Freshness |
| RULE-06 | ISVS-2.3.3: Anti-Replay Mechanisms |
| Audit Log | ISVS-4.1.1: Security Event Logging |
